close_reason: Replaced defdelegate with explicit functions passing opts to Expirable
description:
## Files
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/lease.ex`
- `apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/queue_lease.ex`

## Current Code
```elixir
defdelegate expired?(lease), to: Expirable
defdelegate remaining_ms(lease), to: Expirable
```

## Required Changes
After updating Expirable, update delegates to support optional :now:
```elixir
@spec expired?(t()) :: boolean()
@spec expired?(t(), non_neg_integer()) :: boolean()
def expired?(lease, now \\ System.system_time(:millisecond)) do
  Expirable.expired?(lease, now)
end

@spec remaining_ms(t()) :: non_neg_integer()
@spec remaining_ms(t(), non_neg_integer()) :: non_neg_integer()
def remaining_ms(lease, now \\ System.system_time(:millisecond)) do
  Expirable.remaining_ms(lease, now)
end
```

## Dependencies
Depends on: Expirable module update
title: Update Lease/QueueLease delegates for :now parameter
